name: gamecastle
description: AI 游戏工厂 — 模块化生成、运行和反复迭代可玩游戏

scripts.local:infra:ready: docker compose -f infra/compose.local.yml up -d --wait postgres minio && docker compose -f infra/compose.local.yml run --rm minio-init && npm run local:verify
scripts.local:all: npm run local:infra:ready && npm run check:cloud-library && npm run dev
scripts.check:cloud-library: node ai/check-cloud-library-repository.js && node ai/check-asset-persistence-bridge.js && node ai/check-module-persistence-bridge.js && node ai/check-composition-persistence-bridge.js
scripts.check:project-design: node ai/check-project-completion-contract.js && node ai/check-asset-production-pipeline-design.js && node ai/check-playable-runtime-design.js && node ai/test-playable-runtime-validator.js
scripts.check:wp2: node ai/check-wp2-foundation.js && node ai/check-wp2-product-module-contract.js && node ai/check-template-intake-normalizer.js && node ai/check-fun-blueprint-library.js && node ai/check-project-weave-blueprint-selection.js && node ai/check-blueprint-composition-evidence.js && node ai/check-semantic-reference-resolver.js && node ai/check-product-modules.js && node ai/check-product-module-planner.js && node ai/check-spatial-composition-planner.js && node ai/check-pause-lifecycle.js && node ai/check-controls-fixture.js && node ai/check-score-hud-fixture.js && node ai/check-runner-shooter-fixtures.js && node ai/check-top-down-collector-fixture.js && node ai/check-interaction-puzzle-fixture.js && node ai/check-idle-clicker-fixture.js && node ai/check-product-module-foundry.js && node ai/check-wp2-executable-fixtures.js && node ai/check-wp2-continue-matrix.js && node ai/check-module-ownership-transaction.js && node ai/check-module-configure-delta.js && node ai/check-atomic-group-rollback.js && node ai/check-wp2-product-module-system.js
scripts.check:creator: node ai/check-creator-experience-contract.js && node server/check-local-game-runtime.js && node server/check-project-weave-runner.js && npm --prefix platform run build
scripts.check:provider: node ai/check-provider-runtime-contract.js && node ai/check-provider-runtime.js && node ai/check-responses-client.js && node ai/check-chat-completions-client.js && node ai/check-llm2-deepseek-decision-provider.js && node ai/check-deepseek-cache-monitor.js
scripts.test:tick-input-replay: node ai/test-tick-input-replay.js && node ai/test-tick-policy-resolver.js && node ai/test-tick-performance-evidence.js
scripts.check:visual-assets: node ai/check-gamecastle-style-dna.js && node ai/check-asset-engine-skeleton.js && node ai/test-asset-production-planner.js && node ai/test-asset-production-loop.js && node ai/check-asset-engine-langgraph.js && node ai/check-ai-provider-governance.js && node ai/check-model-policy-gate.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-engine-contract.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-dictionary.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-registry.js && node ai/check-asset-template-dictionary.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-design.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-engine.js && node ai/check-cloud-asset-engine-ports.js && node ai/check-cloud-shared-library-loop.js && node ai/check-local-asset-ops.mjs && node ai/check-local-derivation-kernel.js && node ai/check-local-derivation-handlers.js && node ai/check-comfyui-worker-deployment-approval.js && node ai/check-comfyui-c2-deployment-preflight.js && node ai/check-comfyui-c2-metrics.js && node ai/check-comfyui-worker-provider.js && node server/check-local-asset-http.js && node server/check-asset-release-export.js && node ai/check-runtime-asset-binder.js && node ai/check-asset-export-manifest.js && node ai/check-asset-style-dictionary.js && node ai/check-asset-contract-validator.js && node ai/check-asset-repository.js && node ai/check-asset-model-ports.js && node ai/check-asset-animation-state-machine.js && node ai/check-runtime-animation-recipes.js && node ai/check-project-pipeline-graph.js
scripts.check:ai: npm run check:ai:raw && npm run check:provider && npm run check:llm-transport
